mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, path, component, permission, type, sort, icon, status, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT tsm.* FROM t_sys_menu tsm JOIN t_sys_role_menu tsr ON tsm.id = tsr.menu_id JOIN t_sys_user_role tsur ON tsur.role_id = tsr.role_id WHERE tsur.user_id = #{userId} AND tsm.status = 1 AND tsm.is_deleted = 0 AND tsur.is_deleted = 0 AND tsr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY tsm.sort ASC, tsm.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_sys_menu WHERE path = #{path} AND is_delete = 0
